Video.summary: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we go bag crazy! We share some of our favorite project bags; learn how to crochet a boho-inspired purse; take a field trip to an artisanal mill to see how yarn is made; knit a felted bag made unique with different hardware and straps, and get a quick tip for how your favorite knitting tool can also be used as an integral part of your next, big bag!
Video.title: The Knit Show: The Bag

Image.alt: The Knit Show: The Bag
The Knit Show: The Bag

Arm Knitting: Casting On!
